description.value: The fury has its own opinion about when you're allowed to fall. More than once, it has overruled your body. Each time gets a little harder to pull off, but you're still here.

system.benefits: While in Primal Fury, if you drop to 0 HP you can make a [[/save type=fortitude]] (Hard task = 2 successes). On success, drop to 1 HP instead. Each time you use this after the first, add 1 to both dice. Resets after long rest
